canonical.name_de: Department of Electronic Materials Engineering, Research School of Physics, The Australian National University
canonical.name_en: Department of Electronic Materials Engineering, Research School of Physics, The Australian National University

reason: Beide Varianten bezeichnen dasselbe Department of Electronic Materials Engineering an der ANU Canberra; ID 1852 enthält die vollständige Angabe inklusive 'Research School of Physics' und Postleitzahl, während ID 1851 eine Kurzform ist.
